title: Smart Systems Working Group
content:
Smart Systems Working Group

Research Focus

The Intelligent Systems group focuses mainly on the design, analysis and implementation of computer-based systems supported by artificial intelligence methodologies. These systems include intelligent robotics systems, image processing methods, machine learning, computer vision, pattern recognition, etc. This group influences the graduation projects of senior computer engineering students by steering topics related to intelligent systems activities. Group members have applied for support for projects from various organizations such as Tubitak. In addition, group members have been publishing and preparing papers related to this focused area.
